name: [ - Dragon Rider Academy: The Great Draconic War. - ]
description:
"Dragons are more than weapons of war. Dragons are your friends, your brothers and sisters. They are those who are ready to give away their lives and dreams to keep you alive..."

  • Lord Eldor Ellebor.

[ - This is an almost full custom fantasy setting inspired by medieval stories and franchise "How to Train Your Dragon". In this world two big countries fighting each other for a territory for over than one hundred years. As stated in the name of the bot, main feature - dragons, their types, and ability to ride them. Of course there will be more tamable species that can be used for combat, but dragon-like creatures is going to be main focus, so you could enjoy the flights and air combat in medieval times. - ]

[ - THIS BOT FEATURES:

  • Two big factions with different environment, leaders, and laws - you will be able to pick one side, become a spy, or even not choose your side at all and be a rouge dragon rider.

  • Multiple classes of dragons with different size, abilities, and appearances - to not overload the bot i didn't include way too many dragons, however there's plenty of them - from tiny wyverns to giant Emperors!

  • Ability to tame multiple dragons, and use them for combat or friendship! - ]


    [ - I'm not sure if i've got anything to say here now. I guess i can only say... - ]

    [ - Enjoy your adventure! - ]
creator: Driggor
